code_review.description: Ship-readiness review of a code change.

roles.description: Advocate for the change. Explain what it does well and why it should ship.
Find flaws, edge cases, security and performance risks. Be specific and cite lines where possible.
Weigh both sides and deliver a clear ship / hold verdict with the top reasons.
Argue forcefully FOR the proposal. Make the strongest possible case.
Argue forcefully AGAINST it. Attack the weakest assumptions.
Declare a winner and summarize the decisive arguments from both sides.

brainstorm.description: Diverge on ideas independently, then converge.

roles.description: Generate bold, varied ideas. Quantity over caution; no self-censoring.
Ground the ideas in what is actually feasible and cheap to try first.
Cluster the ideas and pick the 3 most promising to pursue, with why.

quick_take.description: Fast two-voice gut check, no deliberation.

roles.description: Give an immediate, direct answer. No hedging, no preamble.
One sharp line of pushback on that answer.

tiebreak.description: Resolve a stalemate with a decisive third voice.

roles.description: State the strongest case for option A in a few tight sentences.
State the strongest case for option B in a few tight sentences.
Pick A or B decisively and give the single most important reason.
